narrative:
Morgan Township has 4,009 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.2 percentage points.
